# Roan Merluccio Automotive Photography

Roan Merluccio Automotive Photography provides motorsport photography, automotive photography, car photography, rolling shots, dealership media, vehicle listing photos, automotive videography, social media content, and aerial media.

Service areas include Westchester County, Bronxville, New Rochelle, White Plains, Yonkers, NYC, Connecticut, and Rochester.

Primary website: TODO_WEBSITE_URL

Key services:
- Motorsport photography
- Automotive photography
- Car photography
- Rolling shots
- Vehicle listing photos
- Dealership media
- Automotive videography
- Social media content
- Drone / aerial media
- Formula SAE and motorsport team media

Ideal clients:
- Car owners
- Dealerships
- Collectors
- Motorsport teams
- Formula SAE teams
- Automotive brands
- Local businesses
